commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Send the lamb to the ruler of the land from Sela to the wilderness, unto the mount of the daughter of Zion. Hebrew selah, "the rock. "(Haydock) Our Saviour sprung from Ruth, the Moabitess. (Menochius) The original may insinuate, that the king of the country had neglected to pay the usual tribute to Juda, 4 Kings iii. (Calmet) "Send the lamb to the ruler "(Tournemine. ) Amid scenes of distress, the prophet perceives that the Saviour will proceed from one of this nation. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
